creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Well, I just installed rekonq 0.5.0 over the ports.  And I managed to
display the FreeBSD.org website the same way as all other browsers (so
in the correct way).

But for this I had to deactivate JavaScript support in the Webkit
preferences.  A problem in the webkit/JavasScript implemention in
rekonq?  Which is still somewhere between alpha and beta stage at the
moment, by the way.

So for the moment I do not see the need to change anything regarding the
website.  If there is a stable version some day and the problem is
indeed related to our website (which I think is not the case), then we
can re-evaluate this.

But for the moment I will close this PR.


jkois

- -- 
 Johann Kois
 jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
 FreeBSD Documentation Project
 FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
